Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function. Total protein and globulin are low, which may indicate malnutrition or protein loss. LDL cholesterol and triglycerides are elevated, increasing cardiovascular risk. Other parameters, including liver enzymes and electrolytes, are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation of renal function, nutritional status, and lipid management.
